name: Fortress Value Acquisition Corp. II
description: Fortress Value Acquisition Corp. II was a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was sponsored by an affiliate of Fortress Investment Group LLC. In 2021, the company completed its business combination with ATI Physical Therapy, Inc., a leading outpatient physical therapy provider in the United States.
